# HPD.ML.DataSources.DictionaryDataHandle

- Package: `HPD-ML-DataSources` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Kind: `class`

Creates an InMemoryDataHandle from a sequence of string-keyed dictionaries. Useful for dynamic data (API responses, config-driven schemas).

## Declaration

```csharp
public static class DictionaryDataHandle
```

## Methods

### Create

```csharp
public static HPD.ML.Core.InMemoryDataHandle Create(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object>> rows)
```

Create from dictionaries with schema inference from all rows. Types are widened across all rows to find the best common type.

### Create

```csharp
public static HPD.ML.Core.InMemoryDataHandle Create(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object>> rows, HPD.ML.Core.Schema schema)
```

Create from dictionaries with schema inference from all rows. Types are widened across all rows to find the best common type.
